◎简　　介  

　　The Man In The Hat sets off from Marseilles in a small Fiat 500. On the seat beside him is a framed photograph of an unknown woman. Behind him is a 2CV into which is squeezed Five Bald Men. Why are they chasing him? And how can he shake them off?As he travels North through France, he encounters razeteurs, women with stories to tell, bullfights, plenty of delicious food, a dam...
